context: Russia's 2025 music year was defined by a paradox: anti-war artists were silenced or exiled, yet the biggest hits came from apolitical acts. Bond s Knopkoy's indie-folk 'Kukhni' spent 85 days atop Yandex Music. VK Music's Track of the Year was 'Khudi' by Dzhigan, Artik & Asti, and NILETTO. Miyagi & Andy Panda accumulated 590 million streams, and Anna Asti was Artist of the Year for the second consecutive year.

tracks.title: I Got Love
tracks.artist: Miyagi & Andy Panda feat. Rem Digga
